children.text: Your customer number consists of 10 digits. You can find this number on the front of your bank card.
Your card number consists of 17 digits. You can find this number on the front of your bank card.
The user name is the name of the profile you want to link to your customer number and your card number. So it can be your surname, your first name or e.g. a nickname.
You can add a photo to make your profile more recognisable.
Register just once and make Easy Banking more personal by adding a user name and photo to your profile. This makes logging on simpler.
